image:image.image:title: CepeshRC: Browser Extensions & Digital Tools
image:image.image:caption: Home of advanced digital tools: Cxrompix, Anwingels, Lumuji, and RawVamp dark aesthetic photo editor.

image:image.image:title: Image Darkener: Darken Photo Online Free
image:image.image:caption: Instantly darken photos online, apply a shadow overlay, and use vintage camera filter AI for Y2K glitches and dark aesthetic edits.

image:image.image:title: Cxrompix: Bulk Image Downloader & Web Image Extractor
image:image.image:caption: Advanced bulk image downloader and picture scraper. Save any gallery as a ZIP archive instantly.

image:image.image:title: Anwingels: Custom Themes & Export Gemini Chat to PDF
image:image.image:caption: Customize Google Gemini with animated themes, dark mode, and seamless tools to export chat to PDF.

image:image.image:title: Mr. Tenna Shimeji Anime Pet
image:image.image:caption: Interactive desktop pet and animated companion for your browser.
